creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 184435
deprecate p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog

Hi!

Recent update of devel/p5-Log-Any up to version 1.049 made devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog deprecated as p5-Log-Any now includes p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog at CPAN.

devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog should be marked DEPRECATED with EXPIRATION_DATE.
